title: Tag editor component
summary: Build a self-contained tag editor that people can drop into a note, without wiring it into the app yet — so it ships green on its own.
motivation: Add a self-contained NoteTagEditor component for editing a note's tags. Stage 1 of 3 (new then edit then delete): introduces the new component without wiring it into the app, so it lands green on its own.

work_items.title: Tag editor component
work_items.summary: Build the tag editor and a helper that cleans up tag text — lowercase it, trim it, and drop duplicates.
work_items.contract: exports <NoteTagEditor v-model:tags> and normalizeTags(input: string[]): string[]

assertions: NoteTagEditor renders the tags passed to it
normalizeTags lowercases, trims, and de-duplicates its input
